texto: If you admire somebody you should go ahead and tell them
autor: people never get the flowers while they can still smell them.
explicacao: Orientação direta de people never get the flowers while they can still smell them. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “If you admire somebody you should go ahead and tell them” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, reddit, admire, útil em momentos de reflexao.
